ciphers.encoding_hint: the Magician's tool of will. Soldering iron = literal joining of materials, metaphorical joining of disparate systems (code + body + city + demon).

ciphers.text: infinity sigil drawn in code-stream above his head
ciphers.encoding_hint: the infinity Frasier draws is the same one hidden in Priestess's bookshelf (Occult Symbology). He inscribes it; she reads it. Active/passive pair.

ciphers.text: warehouse demon visible at the edge of frame
ciphers.encoding_hint: Frasier is debugging the demonic infestation he summoned (or that summoned through him). The demon's presence is causal, not background.

ciphers.text: glitch frames bleed emerald (Aria's data POV)
ciphers.encoding_hint: Frasier's deeper layer is in Aria's medium — when his image corrupts, Aria's emerald shows through. Same effect as Nicola's portrait.
